name: Banana Condiment- Veg Times
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bananas in the refrigerator at least one day before to blacken.
2. Mash the bananas until almost smooth.
3. Add the juice and raisins.
4. In a pot, bring the mixture to a boil while stirring constantly until it thickens, about 10 minutes.
5. Cool slightly before serving.
6. This recipe can be stored in the refrigerator for 2 or 3 weeks.
7. Serve with jolof rice. Makes 1 cup.
Vegetarian Times
December, 1993
